title: Remove all price amounts from the website

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx, remove all price values from every service item — this includes all currency symbols (e.g. '$', '₹'), numeric amounts (e.g. $85, $110, $145), and any 'From $...' or 'Starting at $...' text. Keep only service category headers and service names. The section layout and styling must remain fully intact.

quotes: Please remove all price amounts from the website completely.
Remove: All dollar amounts ($85, $110, $145, etc.) Any price numbers from services Any "From $..." text
Keep only the service names, without showing any prices.

acceptanceCriteria: No dollar signs ($), rupee symbols (₹), or any other currency symbols appear anywhere on the page.
No numeric price values (e.g. 85, 110, 145) appear in the Pricing section.
No 'From $...', 'Starting at $...', or any price-prefixed strings are rendered.
Service category headers (e.g. Haircuts, Color, Nails) remain visible.
Service names (e.g. Single Process Color, Partial Highlights, Full Highlights) remain visible.
The Pricing section layout (grid, cards, category headers, list structure) is visually unchanged apart from the removed price values.

requirements.text: Audit all other frontend components (Services.tsx, BookingContact.tsx, Hero.tsx, Footer.tsx, Navigation.tsx, MapSection.tsx, FloatingActionButtons.tsx, and any other component) for any remaining price amounts, dollar signs, or 'From $...' text and remove them. Only service names and descriptions should remain.

quotes: Remove: All dollar amounts ($85, $110, $145, etc.) Any price numbers from services Any "From $..." text
Keep only the service names, without showing any prices.

acceptanceCriteria: A full-page scan reveals zero instances of '$', '₹', or any price numeral tied to a service across all rendered components.
Services.tsx cards show only icon, service name, and description — no price figures.
No other section or component displays any monetary value.

constraints: Do not remove or restructure the Pricing section itself — only strip monetary values from it.
Do not alter any section layout, card styling, or typography beyond removing price text.
Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding any new pricing-related UI (e.g. 'Price on request' labels or 'Contact us for pricing' badges) unless it replaces a removed price inline — keep it clean with names only.
Changing the booking form, gallery, testimonials, admin dashboard, or any non-pricing section.
